/usr/bin/g++  -g -g   -static -rdynamic CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/chatserver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/chatservice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/db/db.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/friendMuduo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/groupMuduo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/offlineMsgMuduo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/userMuduo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/redis/redis.cpp.o  -o ../../../bin/ChatServer  ../ConnectionPool/libConnectionPool.a -lmuduo_net -lmuduo_base -lmysqlclient -lhiredis -lssl -lcrypto -ldl -lresolv -lm -lrt -lpthread
